programme.desc: MK encuentra refugio en un lugar inesperado y peligroso, mientras que la lealtad de Sunny se pone a prueba cuando Quinn intenta obligarlo a cometer un acto incalificable.

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión, Acapulco será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta continua y el capitán desata la primera crisis en la casa. La tensión entre Isa y Fernanda crece con un descenlace inesperado y la llegada de Nacha sorprende a todos en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El boss aparece por primera vez. Los Shores descubren que la casa tiene un antro. La relación entre Alba y Fer se hace más fuerte mientras que Nacha le deja saber a Jacky que se le hace una falsa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El capitán regresa a la casa Shore. Un viaje en Catamarán genera un enfrentamiento entre Alba y Chile, mientras que a Fernanda le dañan una noche de pasión y Nacha explota contra Jacky.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jaylin se abre con los Shores y les cuenta su historia. El grupo se relaja en un beach club pero los problemas siguen. Jaylin y Capitán discuten y la situación entre Nacha y Jacky se sale de control.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los Shores vuelven a la casa en autobús y lo que parecía que iba a ser un viaje relajado y divertido, se convierte en un todos contra todos. El Boss se presenta oficialmente y un nuevo integrante llega.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El Team Tendo le organiza una fiesta de 15 a su Matrioska y los Shores se entregan al festejo como solo ellos saben hacerlo. Todo es diversión hasta que una discusión inesperada excede todos los límites.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con la reciente expulsión de Capitán y las mujeres arrancándose las extensiones completamente fuera de sí, los shores prometen descontrolar Acapulco como si fuera la primera vez.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La Matrioska agasaja a sus amigos y organiza un picnic inclusivo, en el cual los Shores abren sus corazones. Con el ánimo al tope, los Shores desfilan por Acapulco y organizan la iniciación de Isa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega a la casa una invitada que promete ponerle picante a estas vacaciones y la bienvenida de los Shores no se hace esperar. Pero no todo es festejo y mientras unos llegan otros deciden partir.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Matheus cambia la dinámica en la casa y las mujeres deliran por el nuevo Shore, pero los hombres no se quedan atrás ya que una bomba argentina los sorprende al llegar junto a Nacha.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha muestra interés por Matheus y Diego explota de celos, aunque la pelea menos pensada se da entre dos mujeres fuertes y el asunto escala en segundos. Se acerca otro juicio en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky es expulsada de la casa y Fernanda decide irse con ella. Chile y Isa se entregan al poliamor y Diana teme sufrir represalias. Los Shores se relajan en la playa pero las insolencias de Diego fastidian a todos.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The first episode recapping the season's best moments, commented by the Shore cast. With unedited scenes and cast members uncovering truths that will leave us all speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heroin use among America's youth is plaguing some of the most prestigious & safest suburban towns. Dr. Phil sheds light on Simi Valley, CA, where residents are fighting a heroin epidemic. Dr. Phil talks to teens., parents & meets with Mayor Bob Huber.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gypsy Willis, a former mistress of a Utah doctor convicted in the 2007 murder of his wife, speaks out about the case & controversies that surround her. Why did she move into MacNeill's home 9 days after his wife's death? Does Gypsy feel he was wronged?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Calah Waskow, 15, made national news when allegedly abducted by her friend's 37-year-old dad. Issuing an Amber Alert, Calah was found five days later. What happened to her? Did she have a secret relationship with the older man? Calah tells her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jessica says mom Patricia says she is defying odds becoming a record-setting weight lifter while simultaneously battling Stage 3 brain cancer. Jessica insists her mom isn't sick at all & she is lying about her health to gain sympathy. Emotions run high!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his exclusive interview with Michelle Knight, the first of three Cleveland kidnapping victims. Michelle, Ariel Castro’s self-professed “most hated” victim, emotionally recounts more horrific details including her dramatic rescue. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After another mass shooting in America, the elementary school in Uvalde, Texas where 2 teachers and 19 children were killed, Dr. Phil dedicates the show to speaking out about how these senseless acts of murder need to end and the importantance of change.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 2. A never-before-aired interview with Dahmer's father and stepmother that sheds light on the monster behind the man. They provide chilling details about his bizarre childhood behaviors.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Two survivors of abduction, Katie Beers and Sarah Maynard, share their stories in exclusive interviews with Dr. Phil. How did they survive their horrifying ordeals?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to Tatiana about a horrific tale of survival: From ages 6-25, her dad forced her to do drugs to sexually abuse her daily; he impregnated her 4 times & she had 3 of his children; he tortured her & beat her with a bat; he stabbed her twice.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Logan, 30, desperately needs help. Mom Tracy says he has gone from a productive computer science engineer to a shell of a human being: no motivation, rarely eats, & can barely function to take care of his basic hygiene needs. Can Logan get back on track?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason Collier was a perfect boyfriend, handsome, & a well-respected police chief of a Texas town. But multiple women he was dating discovered that Jason Collier was every woman's worst nightmare: a married man lying to his wife but also to them. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues dialogue with Amanda who says she was sexually abused by her father, Earl Nix. Hear what Earl said to Amanda during a police-recorded phone call, which the jury heard. Amanda agrees to take a polygraph. Will the results convince? Part 2

programme.desc: A police investigator is mistaken for Sir Philip Sidney in a Tudor-period job agency, which actually deals in pornography; King Solomon judges the case of a stray bee; a panel of dead people debates the question "Is There a Life After Death?"

programme.title: Drop The Dead Donkey: The Gulf Report
programme.desc: The station owner's daughter spends a week in the newsroom; Gus quashes a Gulf War report.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When an epidemic of diarrhea strikes the village, the doctor takes immediate action. This, however, does not go down well with the population.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The doctor pays a visit to the forester, who apparently shares his shack with a giant squirrel. Little Peter Cronk gets into trouble over some nest boxes.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: With John out of the way, the staff fear redundancies as Marcus considers cost-cutting measures.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Clive Evans visits his dad with some news to tell him, but the conversation takes a strange twist.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Edward Lawrence comes to The Grand to find Esmee: forty years ago, they were deeply in love but were forced to part; he's now a wealthy widower and wants to marry her.

programme.title: The Grand
programme.desc: Esmee interviews girls for the club. Many pay protection to Scott, a vicious pimp who, to put her off, smashes up Esmee's room, injuring Kate.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Will and Kate face their biggest test yet when Kate is hit by a patient. Meanwhile, Andrew and Erica make a big mistake when she tries to help him come to terms with Kirsty's departure.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Andrew's depression worsens when he is accused of assaulting a patient. Meanwhile, Will tries to convince Kate to move in with him.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Will and Kate are knocked sideways when Kate finds out she is pregnant. Both are torn over whether this is the right time for them to be having a child.

programme.title: Peak Practice
programme.desc: Will and Erica are stood up on the morning they are meant to sign their partnership agreement. Andrew returns to Cardale, but have his shoes been filled by Will's friend David?

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: An old friend of Aunt Joan's turns up, stirring up old memories. In the meanwhile, both Doc Martin and Elaine are struggling with other people's affections.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Word is getting out in the village about the doctor's 'little problem' with blood. When Peter Cronk is hurt, concern about him brings Martin and Louisa closer together.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa's old flame, Danny Steel, comes to Portwenn hoping to rekindle their romance. He is furious with Martin for interfering with his mother's move to a nursing home.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When his mother has to go to hospital, Peter Cronk needs a place to stay. The doctor isn't too keen, but Louise is busy with her candidature for headmistress.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Patriota herido
programme.desc: Cuando el asesinato de un compañero conmociona al equipo, Gibbs descubre un sorprendente vínculo con el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Regla 51
programme.desc: Gibbs se dirige a México para enfrentarse a sus demonios y tomar una decisión sorprendente, en el final de la séptima temporada de NCIS.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La delgada línea azul
programme.desc: Cuando Danny intercepta un envío de varios millones de dólares que estaba destinado a un cártel de drogas en México, se convierte en un blanco cuando ellos regresan en busca de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el estreno de la octava temporada, con Paloma Reynosa aún suelta, Gibbs debe tomar medidas desesperadas para proteger a sus seres queridos.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight intense female athletes come to the ranch to compete in Summit, Death Grip and The Peak. They will do whatever it takes to earn the right to take on Steve Austin's Skullbuster and win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites back former bracket champions and competitors they took out along the way who are back for revenge. But it won't be easy as they have to fight through Trench Warfare and Chain Gang.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin welcomes back eight of the toughest runners up to ever compete on the ranch for a second shot at glory. They'll battle it out in The Drain and The Octagon before two of them get a chance at the Skullbuster and $25,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites back sixteen of his favorite competitors for a special Co-Ed Broken Skull Challenge, where they will take on brand new challenges The Monster and Block Party.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: An action-packed challenge sends the teams flying and lands one player in the hospital. Margaret continues to alienate the rest of the house while Cowboy and Cody almost come to blows.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.desc: Aired 4/7/2017. Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of the Unabomber.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 12/10/2017. A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it. Did Scott Peterson murder Laci?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 12/10/2017. A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it. Did Scott Peterson murder Laci?

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reckless driver claims he wants to kill himself. A woman steals $1,700 from a man trying to buy drugs. Police arrest a man for drinking a driving.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a stolen car leads police on a winding chase, undercover officers run a prostitution sting, and a woman's domestic disturbance call leads to her own arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for backup after a woman is held at knife-point.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine violates department protocol when she takes the case of a rape accusation against her ex-husband. Warrick and Sara search for the missing bullet that will either exonerate or indict a cop for murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighborhood, Grissom and his entire team investigate the crime.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Royce Harmon was murdered 3 months ago in a scene staged to look like a suicide. Now another murder has taken place. Whoever the killer is he has a thorough knowledge of forensics, he purposefully has left evidence, and has baffled Grissom and his team.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the death of a first class passenger on a flight to Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate a bug riddled body found in the desert. Warrick and Catherine look into the theft of some valuable art.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man about to go on trial for arson and the murder of his wife and child seeks assistance from Grissom to help prove his innocence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in an office building, killing one and injuring many more. The chief suspect is a security guard who left minutes before the explosion and has knowledge in bomb making.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a single human bone is discovered in the desert, Grissom and Catherine must cover miles of territory to find the rest of the skeleton.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un preso condenado a muerte manda un video pidiendo ayuda a Gil, afirmando que es inocente de la muerte de su mujer y su hijo, Gill acepta el caso y con la ayuda de Sara y de Warrick intenta averiguar lo que de verdad sucedió en la casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una bomba explota en un edificio de oficinas matando a una persona e hiriendo a muchas más. El principal sospechoso es un guardia de seguridad que se marchó minutos antes de la explosión y que tiene conocimiento en la fabricación de bombas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre un único hueso humano en el desierto, Grissom y Catherine deben recorrer kilómetros de territorio para encontrar el resto del esqueleto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En una elegante recaudación de fondos, a la que asiste el sheriff, una mujer aparece muerta en la piscina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer es secuestrada en el aparcamiento de un centro comercial. Es violada, golpeada, disparada y dada por muerta. Sara recoge pruebas de ella y se encariña con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Encuentran un cadáver en una tienda de cerámica en lo que parece ser un robo interrumpido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una pareja que sale de un restaurante en su aniversario es asesinada en la calle y su coche es robado. La escena del crimen se ve comprometida cuando llueve poco después de que lleguen los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo investiga el secuestro del hijo pequeño de una familia acomodada. Las sospechas recaen inmediatamente sobre los padres del niño.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos adolescentes atropellan con su coche a un sordo, pero no lo matan: ya estaba muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick y Warrick toman el caso de un corredor que fue asesinado por un animal salvaje en el parque. La cosa se complica cuando descubren que al corredor le extirparon el hígado después de matarlo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El día que Grissom tiene que evaluar a su equipo, se encuentra una cabeza en el maletero de un coche. Mientras Gil y Catherine trabajan en la cabeza, Sara y Nick investigan un cadáver en el desierto al que le falta la cabeza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los continuos asesinatos cometidos por un asesino de firma. El asesino tiene ciertos conocimientos forenses y ha dejado pocas pruebas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo son llamados después de que Tony Braun, un conocido drogadicto, es encontrado muerto en su casa por un jardinero.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo de CSI investiga una desaparición en una universidad local.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin literally becomes part of a murder crime scene after he steals a latex glove to add to his personal forensic collection.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A slippery journalist is the only witness to a murder, and Horatio suspects that he may be looking for a much bigger story.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a police officer is shot to death while on the job, the CSIs track who he saw while that night and learn that he picked-up a call girl.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: CSIs investigate the lives of those living in a high-end airpark after a prop plane crashes into a local Miami beach hot spot.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A security guard is found dead after shots ring out at rap star 10-Large’s concert and the CSI are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When evidence at a murder investigation leads the CSIs to believe the killer may be in NYC, Horatio takes his investigation to the Big Apple.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An adult film actress is found strangled to death in the park and the CSIs are called in to investigate and find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A dangerous investigation leads the CSI team down a treacherous road that will lead to the tragic loss of one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Yelina's life is in danger when the Horatio and the CSI team works a case to convict a rapper suspected of a Miami-style drive-by.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flash mob erupts on a private golf course, where the group of students there to hide a body or were they there to leave one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s club scene turns deadly when underage drinking sparks a bloody murder in a bathroom stall, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A jury field trip to the scene of a murder flips the legal tables when the defendant ends up dead and the twelve jurors become the prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A “Speed Dating” night for Miami singles turns deadly for one South Beach stud who finds himself on the wrong end of a tire iron.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods y Eric Delko regresan para ayudar a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI a detener un brote viral mortal en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI recrean una noche de libertinaje de una despedida de soltero para resolver un asesinato y encontrar a un novio desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine llama al Dr. Ray Langston del equipo de CSI de Las Vegas para que venga a Miami cuando se descubre una pierna amputada en los Everglades.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan quién o qué causó un horrible accidente de auto, se revelan los secretos más oscuros de ambos conductores.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En la hermosa Miami, se están usando medusas mortales como arma asesina y regresa una misteriosa mujer del pasado de Jesse.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La investigación sobre la muerte de un trabajador del censo coloca al equipo en una persecución de autos a alta velocidad y en una explosión que amenaza la vida de dos CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Eric Delko regresa a Miami como testigo experto de la defensa y enfrenta a sus viejos amigos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la novia de Estados Unidos, Phoebe Nichols, arde en llamas durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI expone el lado oscuro del estrellato pop.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El extraño caso de un hombre cortado por la mitad desconcierta a Horatio y al equipo de CSI, mientras que la lesión de Natalia pone a Ryan y a ella en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI tienen 24 horas para descubrir si un hombre condenado a muerte es realmente culpable y Eric Delko vuelve a trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI resuelven el homicidio de un hombre que fue asesinado en el espacio exterior antes de devolver su cuerpo a la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y Delko deben viajar a la brillante y soleada Los Ángeles cuando un secreto del pasado de Jesse quizá permita que un asesino quede libre.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI desentrañan el complicado misterio de un asesinato en un lugar de trabajo cuando encuentran a una odiada recepcionista asesinada en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Horatio Caine, Kyle, regresa de la guerra, busca la ayuda de su padre y del equipo de CSI para resolver un inquietante asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict is found dead in an alley and the CSI New York team discovers he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a brutal stabbing, they discover that evidence at the crime scene was planted which pits them against a trusted colleague.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two young journalists are found dead on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs try to find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A death row inmate's final request brings Hawkes to a Pennsylvania prison and face-to-face with a personal secret just as a prison riot erupts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The shooting of a 14-year-old boy in front of his 12-year-old brother takes Detective Mac Taylor’s drive for justice to another level.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a slab of concrete starts bleeding in midtown, the CSIs' investigation takes them into an underground world of hardcore fighting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being injured, Mac watches his neighbors while recuperating and witnesses mysterious activity that leads to murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cerca de la muerte (S8 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando Mac recibe un disparo, se encuentra en el limbo entre la vida y la muerte, mientras lucha por su vida, su equipo debe llevar al tirador ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Reavivó (S9 Ep1)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 4.700 kilómetros (S9 Ep3)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin palabras (S9 Ep4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para atrapar a un tirador cuando Lindsay resulta herida durante el intento de asesinato de un candidato político.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Idea equivocada (S9 Ep5)

programme.title: CSI: New York: La dama del agua (S9 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un cuento de hadas retorcido cuando encuentran a una mujer con un vestido de gala en el fondo del estanque fuera del castillo de Belvedere en el Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego mortal
programme.desc: Cuando los pacientes de un psiquiatra son asesinados sistemáticamente, el equipo de CSI se ve obligado a seguir el juego Cluedo para atrapar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prueba de honor (S9 Ep8)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Código sangriento (S9 Ep9)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fantasmas del pasado (S9 Ep10)

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Bailando con lobos
programme.desc: Enviado para proteger un puesto fronterizo de Estados Unidos, el teniente John Dunbar se hace amigo de aquellos que él pensaba que tenía que temerle, los indios Sioux.

programme.title: Tan distinto como yo
programme.desc: Del éxito de ventas del NY Times llega una historia inspiradora y verdadera sobre dos hombres de orígenes radicalmente opuestos, que desarrollan un sorprendente vínculo que los llevará al viaje más notable de sus vidas y forjará una amistad eterna.

programme.title: Hostile Border LAS
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: Madison
programme.desc: Miss Madison, un destartalado hidroplano, ha sido inscrito en la carrera del campeonato de la Copa de Oro. Jim McCormick, un hombre local que ha sacrificado el futuro de su familia para participar en la carrera, es escogido como su piloto.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: Te amaré en silencio
programme.desc: Basada en el éxito teatral de Broadway, esta es la inspiradora historia de John Leeds, un maestro idealista de educación especial, y una obstinada joven sorda, Sarah. Al poco tiempo, la relación entre el maestro y su alumna se convierte en amor.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: Revancha
programme.desc: Tras un exitoso atraco, Porter es dado por muerto. Una vez recuperado, busca venganza y quiere su parte del dinero.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Rogue Warfare
programme.desc: Stephen Lang (Avatar) protagoniza Rogue Warfare, una película llena de acción en la que se reúne un equipo internacional de soldados expertos de las fuerzas especiales, para una misión secreta en Afganistán.

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Argentina, 1985
programme.desc: A legal team takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship during the 1980s in a battle against odds and a race against time.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Colegas
programme.desc: Cuando José deja embarazada a Rosario, la hermana de su mejor amigo Antonio, los tres deben buscar una solución para evitar la furia de sus padres.

programme.title: Santa Clara
programme.desc: Santiago, un hombre misterioso que trabaja como vaquero, acepta conducir 2000 cabezas de ganado al rancho Santa Clara. Pero ir allí significa dejar atrás su pasado o tomar venganza contra quienes lo obligaron a partir.

programme.title: Cholitas
programme.desc: Cinco mujeres indígenas bolivianas participan en una expedición única. Como símbolo de liberación y empoderamiento, proponen escalar la montaña más alta de América.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos

programme.title: Supernova: el fin del universo

programme.title: Portadores

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de un día de pesca en un tranquilo pueblo de Suiza, un adolescente no regresa a casa como se planeó. La investigación revela algunas evidencias microscópicas importantes en el agua cerca de donde fue visto por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando el número y volumen de manchas de sangre es mayor que la habitual en la escena del crimen, es el trabajo de los científicos forenses el determinar el por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un hombre rico y su esposa fueron atacados por tres hombres enmascarados fuera de su lujosa casa en Louisiana. A él le dispararon hasta causarle la muerte y a ella la obligaron a abrir la caja fuerte que tenían escondida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos sospechosos están vinculados a un asesinato por unas botas manchadas de sangre y una pistola, pero el dueño de los artículos dice que nunca conoció a la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Placas y mentiras
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, la agente de bienes raíces de Texas Sarah Anne Walker fue brutalmente asesinada en una casa modelo. Semanas después, se presentó un testigo que pudo haber visto al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After trumpet player Scott Sessions fails to show up for a scheduled gig, his family learns his body was abandoned in the remote Colorado Rockies; as the investigation narrows in on two suspects, a second murder catches police by surprise.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police investigate the shooting death of a man who was in bed with his wife, they discover a complex case with two suspects.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Boxin' Each Other Out
programme.desc: The five girls left want the inside scoop, so he puts all five of the girls in the parlor with a ballot box and pictures of themselves.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Steppin' Out Flav Style
programme.desc: Four girls are left and it's time to go on a little trip. Flav takes two girls down to the shore for a day of sailing with his ladies as crew. Then to the luxurious Queen Mary for an overnight.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Oh No She Didn't! (Clip Show)
programme.desc: A lot of incredible stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls' arrived.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: I Love New York: Gettin' Hot In The Desert
programme.desc: New York wants to get to know the guys better so she takes them on 2 separate overnight double dates to Palm Springs. At the end of each night, she chooses one special guy to join her in her room for a nightcap.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma's Boys
programme.desc: All 3 guys have met New York's mom, now it's her turn to meet theirs. The guys and their moms do their best to impress NY and Sister Patterson but they are tough ladies.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Shawn Isaac, a former politician and current rapper who judges women based on their resume, and 90's rap icon, Monie Love, who micromanages her men into man babies arrive! Will Patti find these two rappers love?

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti faces off against social media addict Christopher Lourdes who picks up women by flashing his wealth on Instagram and Love and Hip Hop star Tiffany Foxx, a sexy rapper who is seduced by bad boys.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Patti battles Marcellas Reynolds, an explosive celeb stylist with a "hit it and quit it" habit while she guides Baywatch babe Donna D'Errico as she dives back into dating for the first time since her divorce.

programme.title: Million Dollar Matchmaker
programme.desc: Two Real Housewives check into the Millionaire's Club! New York's "Crazy" Kelly Bensimon must overcome her bad reputation while Atlanta's Claudia Jordan, a liar magnet, exposes a shocking secret.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: Two families, both whom have never met, have agreed that the Wives will swap homes, children and husbands for two weeks to see what they can learn from their own lives.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: A look at extraordinary animals around the world, emphasising their unpredictable behaviour.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts visits the Arabian Desert to find clues as to how a tiny group left the African continent around 70,000 years ago.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts' journey continues into Asia in a quest to find out how early hunter-gatherers survived in the inhospitable Arctic region of Northern Siberia. Alice meets the nomadic Evenki people.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Göbeklitepe ruins discovered in Turkey's history goes back 12,000 years. How and in what way did the descendants of the Neanderthals, the Aztecs of Europe, disappear with the arrival of Homo sapiens?

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts looks at our ancestors' seemingly impossible journey to Australia. Miraculously preserved footprints and very old human fossils buried in the outback suggest a mystery: that humans reached Australia almost before anywhere else.

programme.title: Human Journey
programme.desc: How did Stone Age people reach North and South America? Dr Alice Roberts discovers evidence for an ancient corridor through the Canadian ice sheet that may have allowed those first people through.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo arrive at Stangmoor Prison for a demonstration of the Keller Machine, a device capable of extracting negative emotions from criminal minds.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: A prison riot puts Jo in danger while the Doctor assists the Brigadier. Meanwhile, at the World Peace Conference, the Chinese delegate's aid prepares to kill the American delegate.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: Newly recovered, the Doctor escapes from his cell with Jo. The Master plans to use the Keller Machine to recruit the rioting inmates at Stangmoor Prison and attack the World Peace Conference.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The mind parasite within the Keller Machine becomes too powerful for the Master to control. It learns how to move on its own and goes on the hunt for new minds.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The Master forms an uneasy alliance with the Doctor so that between them they can subdue the Keller Machine which is now out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The Brigadier brings the prison under control, but the Master has escaped and plans to start a world war. The Keller Machine breaks free of the Doctor's restraining device and the Doctor has no choice but to turn the parasite against the Master.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: The Doctor tries to prevent Professor Horner from breaking into an ancient barrow near the village of Devil’s End. Posing as the village vicar, the Master summons dark forces.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: Devil’s End is sealed off from the outside world by a heat barrier. The Doctor and Jo return to the barrow where they are confronted by the gargoyle, Bok.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to help the Brigadier penetrate the heat barrier but is attacked by the Master’s servant in a helicopter. The Master prepares to summon the Daemon Azal.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the villagers who are under the Master’s control. Jo goes to the church to prevent the Master from summoning Azal for the final time but is too late.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: UNIT have penetrated the heat barrier and launch an attack on the gargoyle, Bok. In the cavern, the Daemon Azal confronts the Doctor and the Master to decide the fate of mankind.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: When Sir Reginald Styles claims to have seen a ghost, UNIT is called in. The Doctor and Jo spend the night at Styles' house and become the target of an assassin.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: As captive of the guerrillas, the Doctor discovers they intend to change history. Jo is transported to the 22nd Century where she unwittingly gives vital information to the Daleks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives in a bleak future where Earth is ruled by the Daleks and mankind is enslaved. Rescuing Jo, the two escape but the brutish Ogrons are in pursuit.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Controller betrays the Daleks and is exterminated. The Daleks travel back in time to the 20th Century to ensure that the peace conference fails.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The planet Peladon is hoping to join the Galactic Federation. But King Peladon’s Chancellor has been murdered and it seems that the legendary royal beast, Aggedor is to blame.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The work of the committee is hampered by sabotage, fear, and suspicion. The Doctor knows the Ice Warriors of old and believes that they may be the guilty party.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The Doctor is sentenced to a fight to the death in the pit with the King’s champion, Grun. But the saboteur and killer is still at large.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: Hepesh, supported by the delegate from Arcturus, is revealed to be behind the attacks. Arcturus is killed but Hepesh escapes to rouse a rebellion against the King.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo visit the Master who is held prisoner on an island. There they learn that several ships have recently been sunk in the area and the Doctor decides to investigate.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is eager to make peace between the Sea Devils and the humans but has discovered that the Master is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: Jo attempts to rescue the Doctor who is being held prisoner by the Master and Trenchard. The Master plans to summon the Sea Devils from beneath the waves.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to persuade Captain Hart of the danger that the Master represents. Eager to make contact with the Sea Devils, the Doctor journey's to the sea bed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the Sea Devils and taken to their undersea base. There, he tries to make peace with the creatures, but his efforts are thwarted by the Navy.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Sea Devils come to the surface and attack the Naval base. The Doctor is forced to create a machine that will awaken the creatures across the entire world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: Attacked by an antimatter creature the Doctor sends an SOS to the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Three Doctors
programme.desc: The Doctor and Jo pass through the black hole to the desolate world of antimatter.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Stella is a bulldog mascot for a dog-friendly cafe; a German shepherd who barks to loud, and two aggressive miniature pinschers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: At an army base, Cesar helps an Australian shepherd scared of men in uniform and a Shetland shepherd who barks non-stop when planes fly overhead.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Melody and Tom, who is so terrified of dogs that he will even leave a job site if one is near, deal with their fears and anxieties.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem. Owen has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen. With Dog's help he tries to track down the co-signer but they come up dry.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir-crazy, but Dog has the cure; a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead. She was recently spotted during a bust at a local chop shop garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has two fugitives to catch, and he gets help from the unlikeliest sources--the fugitives' mothers. First, Ginger's mother wants to revoke her daughter's bond. Then Brandon's mother decides to revoke his bond because Brandon has an ice habit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog kick-starts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Pick A Puppy
programme.desc: The Fraser family looks for a dog to join their family. They meet with the Beagle, the Havanese, and with the Old English Sheep Dog. But can they convince Dad that there are other dogs besides the Old English Sheep Dog?
